name: Akbar Jathab
overview:
The Iraqi series "Akbar Jathab" (أكبر جذاب) is a comedy show produced in 2012, directed by Ali Abu Khumra and Muhannad Abu Khumra, and written by Hussein Najjar, Mohammed Khmas, and Fadhel Baghdadi. The series parodies famous international films in a comedic style, using graphics and humor to recreate 30 well-known movie scenes.

The series won the Best Comedy Award at the Cairo Arab Media Festival in 2012.

trailers.title: اعلان اكبر جذاب .. hollywood Star War movie
